description:
A suspect in an intellectual property theft case is believed to have hidden stolen source code and financial data inside a password-protected ZIP archive on a USB drive. Perform a forensic analysis of the disk image /home/ga/evidence/suspect_usb.dd. Create an Autopsy case named 'Encrypted_Triage_2024' (Case number 'INV-ENC-009') in /home/ga/Cases/ to identify and tag the encrypted archive as 'ENCRYPTED_CONTRABAND'. Export the ZIP file to /home/ga/Reports/exported_archives/ and recover its contents using the password list provided in /home/ga/evidence/suspect_passwords.txt. Extract all internal files to /home/ga/Reports/uncovered_evidence/. Finally, generate a findings report at /home/ga/Reports/decryption_report.txt containing the following sections:
ARCHIVE_NAME: <name_of_the_zip_file>
CRACKED_PASSWORD: <the_successful_password>
EXTRACTED_FILES:
<filename_1>
<filename_2>
